payload.message: Morning inbox processing. Check the Todoist inbox count. If there are items, message the user with the count and ask if they want to process. If the inbox is empty, say nothing.

Evening planning. Follow the 'Evening — plan tomorrow' instructions from GTFD-SKILL.md. Check tomorrow's calendar, existing tasks due tomorrow, overdue tasks, and routine items. Present a summary and suggest 1-3 backlog tasks. Ask for context about tomorrow before finalizing.
Weekly review. Follow the 'Weekly review' instructions from GTFD-SKILL.md. Go through all the steps: collect, process inbox, review calendar, review projects, stale tasks, someday/maybe.
